title: Analytics - Fit Test Opened
scenario: Fit Test screen open event is logged with analytics metrics in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a connected Android device.
3. Locate and tap the Fit Test tab (or navigate to Fit Test from the Home screen).
4. Observe that the Fit Test screen opens and loads.
5. Wait a few hours for the analytics event to be processed and logged.
6. Check the analytics backend/dashboard for the Fit Test screen open event.
7. Verify the event metrics: event count by country, gender, per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: The Fit Test screen open event is logged in analytics with correct metrics (event count by country, gender, per session, app version, app build, and app environment) after a few hours.
